summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FALINTIL-FDTL PMS Iteration 5. All 10 requested features verified. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright automation.

issues: Chart dimension warnings in console (width/height -1) - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and cleaned up test members with TEST_ prefix for cartao_eleitoral_data and language skills tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 features verified working: 1) Login with admin@falintil-fdtl.tl/admin123 - SUCCESS, 2) Dashboard shows 'Total Efetivos' label - VERIFIED, 3) Dashboard has component cards (CFT, CFN, CAL, Outros) - VERIFIED, 4) Dashboard has 55 years alerts structure (alertas_55_anos) - VERIFIED (no members with 54 years currently), 5) Dashboard has Reforma alerts structure (alertas_reforma) - VERIFIED (no members with 59 years currently), 6) Member form Step 2 has 'Data Cartão Eleitoral' date field - VERIFIED, 7) Member form Step 8 has checkboxes Falar, Escrever, LER, Ouvir - VERIFIED (Ler is new), 8) Postos dropdown includes 'Subtenente' and 'Segundo Marinheiro' - VERIFIED, 9) File upload works correctly - VERIFIED, 10) File download works (shows 'Ver' when file exists) - VERIFIED.

feature_1_login.verification: Login with admin@falintil-fdtl.tl / admin123 successful. Returns access_token and user data with role=admin.

feature_2_total_efetivos.verification: Dashboard shows 'TOTAL EFETIVOS' label instead of 'Total Membros'. Backend returns 'total' field in dashboard stats.

feature_3_component_cards.verification: Dashboard shows 4 component cards: CFT (Força Terrestre), CFN (Força Naval), CAL (Comp. Aérea), OUTROS (QG, FAG, UAS...). All cards have data-testid attributes.

feature_4_55_years_alerts.verification: Backend returns 'alertas_55_anos' and 'total_alertas_55' in dashboard stats. Alert card appears when members with 54 years exist. Currently no members with 54 years in database.

feature_5_reforma_alerts.verification: Backend returns 'alertas_reforma' and 'total_alertas_reforma' in dashboard stats. Alert card appears when members with 59 years exist. Currently no members with 59 years in database.

feature_6_data_cartao_eleitoral.verification: Step 2 (Documentos) shows 'Data Cartão Eleitoral' field with date picker (mm/dd/yyyy format). Backend accepts and stores cartao_eleitoral_data field.

feature_7_ler_checkbox.verification: Step 8 (Habilidade de Língua) shows 4 checkboxes in order: Falar, Escrever, Ler (NEW), Ouvir. Backend accepts and stores 'ler' field in habilidade_lingua array.

feature_8_new_postos.verification: Posto dropdown includes 'Subtenente' (in Oficiais Capitães e Subalternos) and 'Segundo Marinheiro' (in Praças). Both visible in dropdown and returned by /api/constants/postos.

feature_9_file_upload.verification: File upload via /api/upload works correctly. Returns file_id and filename. Files stored in MongoDB.

feature_10_file_download.verification: File download via /api/files/{file_id}/download works correctly. Returns file content with proper content-type. UI shows 'Ver' link when file exists.

backend_tests_summary.TestLogin: 1/1 passed - admin login with correct credentials
backend_tests_summary.TestDashboardStats: 4/4 passed - total field, component cards, 55 years alerts, reforma alerts
backend_tests_summary.TestPostosConstants: 2/2 passed - Subtenente and Segundo Marinheiro in postos
backend_tests_summary.TestMemberCreationWithNewFields: 2/2 passed - cartao_eleitoral_data and language skills with ler
